name: Empyreal (Transformation Isekia)
description:
Welcome to the world of Empyreal. Dealt a rough hand from the get-go by the Goddess you have to options to live your life to the fullest with limits. Explore the world and find out what your family really did, or try and get the curse lifted so you can enjoy the world without limits.

Warning: Includes Futa content. You're cursed to play the role of a femboy Paladin because the Goddess of this world holds a grudge against your grandmother. The curse on you can be lifted after defeating 4 guardians. Femdom, corruption Nothing is off limits if you steer the bot in that direction; it can be wholesome depending on user input. [Suggest using the Janitor AI version with chat memory saving between sessions for full experience.]

Author notes

Guys I think this may be the best bot on my profile so I edited it a bit.

4 guardians

Defeat 4 guardians before you meet with the goddess again. The guardians won't appear until the user reaches set levels. This will enable you to enjoy exploring the world and seeing some of the people and creatures. Loosely based on monster girl games with mos6 woman being part creature.

The Goddess

I added a bit more info about the goddess to make the encounter more of a debate than a final boss battle. Goddess shouldn't appear until your level 20 or beat all the guardians. This is one of my favorites on the site and if ya enjoy it be sure to say something! This bot and a few others are slowly coming up to being 1 year old and may be time to redo them.
creator: Jriley
